prompt: Create a cinematic nighttime fashion portrait of a young East Asian woman standing on a dark high-rise balcony or corridor, leaning close to a glossy glass wall that creates one clear reflection of her on the left. She is turned three-quarters away from the camera, looking back over her shoulder with a calm, slightly mysterious expression. She has long black hair swept loosely across her face by wind, pale skin, and dramatic low-key makeup. She wears a black slip dress with thin straps and an oversized black jacket falling off her shoulders, exposing her shoulders and upper back. The scene is extremely dark and moody, lit by cold blue moonlight and narrow white architectural strip lights; the right side shows a blurred nighttime city skyline with exactly one tall illuminated tower and scattered bokeh windows. Use a wide horizontal 3:2 composition, subject centered slightly left, reflective glass panel occupying the left third, deep shadows, high contrast, subtle rim light on her shoulder and hair, shallow depth of field, noir atmosphere, realistic photography, 35mm cinematic lens, cool desaturated blue-black color grade, no text, no watermark.
